title: Refresh and Reload
drDigitalIntro: Sometimes a website loads partially or gets stuck — clicking the Refresh button (the circular arrow icon) reloads the page. Press Command+R for refresh. If that doesn't work, try a 'hard refresh' with Command+Shift+R — this clears cached data and gets the newest version. Most of the time, a simple refresh fixes loading problems.

playgroundTask.question: A webpage is stuck loading. What keyboard shortcut refreshes it?

drDigitalSuccess: Command + R — R for Reload! It's the first thing to try when a page acts up.
drDigitalHint: R for Reload, or Refresh — same letter, same Command pattern.
